report_name: US Government Orders Anthropic to Halt Foreign Access to Advanced AI Models

tools.name: Fable 5
tools.description: A powerful AI model developed by Anthropic that was widely released to the public. The U.S. government ordered access to be suspended for all foreign nationals due to national security concerns.

tools.name: Mythos 5
tools.description: A more capable, limited-access AI model developed by Anthropic. The U.S. government ordered access to be suspended for all foreign nationals due to its potential for misuse in cybersecurity contexts.

identities.name: U.S. Government
identities.description: The government entity that directed Anthropic to suspend access to its advanced AI models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, for all foreign nationals, citing national security concerns.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: The AI research company ordered by the U.S. government to suspend access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for foreign nationals.

identities.name: Foreign Nationals
identities.description: The class of users for whom the U.S. government has mandated Anthropic to suspend access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models.
